    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)

    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 6): b10 on table, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12, b14 on b13, b15 on b14

    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)

      (on b12 b13)
